use_cases: Interactive hero section background that responds to mouse movement
Decorative animated canvas layer for landing pages and product demos
Visual effect component for creating dynamic vector field swirls
Full-height responsive background with customizable line styling
Interactive ambient animation for websites and applications
ai_summary: A canvas-based interactive vector field animation that displays a grid of vectors rotating based on mouse proximity using mathematical calculations. The component renders smooth, animated lines that create a dynamic swirl effect responding to cursor position, with customizable background transparency, line color, weight, and density. Perfect as an ambient interactive background for hero sections, landing pages, or decorative overlays in creative and product applications.
